EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team have been unable to speak with a customer at the fourth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Final chase exhausted - FUL/ADM
EmailTemplate.subject: Not ready to renew your policy yet?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
So far you have not opted to move forward with your renewal.
We understand that there can be many reasons why you may not want to continue with a renewal, so we want to check if these apply to you.
Found cover elsewhere? If you let us know the cover levels and the quoted price you have received or attach your quotation documents. I can give you a call to discuss if we are able to amend our original quote.
Not currently working? If you are not currently working, we would discourage you from not holding an active policy; unless you’re stopping self-employment altogether, a break in cover could affect your business.
If you are interested in proceeding with your renewal quote, give me a ring on 01242 808 740 and I’ll be happy to help.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
